'''tarofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squarehead|squarehead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squarehead|squarehead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tarofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tærefeth|tærefeth]] || [[word:tærefej|tærefej]] || [[word:tærefesh|tærefesh]] || [[word:tærefe|tærefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tarorofoth|tarorofoth]] || [[word:tarorofoj|tarorofoj]] || [[word:tarorofosh|tarorofosh]] || [[word:tarorofo|tarorofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tarofoth|tarofoth]] || [[word:tarofoj|tarofoj]] || [[word:tarofosh|tarofosh]] || [[word:tarofo|tarofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:taroffoth|taroffoth]] || [[word:taroffoj|taroffoj]] || [[word:taroffosh|taroffosh]] || [[word:taroffof|taroffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarofotho|tarofotho]] || [[word:tarofojo|tarofojo]] || [[word:tarofosho|tarofosho]] || [[word:tarofoko|tarofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tarofoth|tarofoth]] || [[word:tarofoj|tarofoj]] || [[word:tarofosh|tarofosh]] || [[word:tarofo|tarofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarofothol|tarofothol]] || [[word:tarofojol|tarofojol]] || [[word:tarofoshol|tarofoshol]] || [[word:tarofokol|tarofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tarofothotho|tarofothotho]] || [[word:tarofojojo|tarofojojo]] || [[word:tarofoshosho|tarofoshosho]] || [[word:tarofoko|tarofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarofothon|tarofothon]] || [[word:tarofojon|tarofojon]] || [[word:tarofoshon|tarofoshon]] || [[word:tarofokon|tarofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarofothoro|tarofothoro]] || [[word:tarofojoro|tarofojoro]] || [[word:tarofoshoro|tarofoshoro]] || [[word:tarofokoro|tarofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
